titles.title: HE DIDN’T HAVE TO DO IT

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: He didn’t have to do it but He did He didn’t have to do it but He did, yeah. He woke me up this morning and started me on my way, He didn’t have to do it but He did. He didn’t have to save me, thank God He did, He didn’t have to save me but He did, yeah. He woke me up this morning and started me on my way, He didn’t have to save me but He did. He didn’t have to wake me, but He did, He didn’t have to wake me I’m glad He did Don’t you know He shook me until He woke and started me on my way, He didn’t have to do it but He did. The Lord has been so good to me, I can say the Lord has been so good to me, yeah. Don’t you know He woke me up this morning and started me on my way, He didn’t have to do it, but He did
